revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-175

An instrument that measures the consumption of energy in watt-hours.


Note:  The term kilowatt-hour meter applies when the consumption is measured in kilowatt-hours.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Watt-hour meter}}
